sub_modules.ifft16_bit_reverse_index: Combinational 4-bit bit-reversal mapper used while loading DIT input memory.
sub_modules.ifft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16 positive-exponential IFFT rotation.
sub_modules.ifft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point radix-2 complex butterfly with rounded Q1.15 twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.ifft16_output_scale: Combinational final arithmetic right-shift normalization by 16 for IFFT output.
